results.name: Tunisia
results.key_finding: Open 2026-07-10 proposal (34.4->23.8) REAFFIRMED (day 2, status proposed). New Jul 8 HRC 62nd-session close + Bensedrine 25yr/~US$600M fine corroboration is fully consistent with the 23.8 basis; figure unchanged; no duplicate proposal opened; published stays 34.4 (not applied).

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Earthquake toll ~3,899 (flat); external aid inflows (US $300M, govt $200M fund, IMF $4.85B request) partly offset state-capacity gaps. Evidenced response-failure move remains ~-2.7, sub-threshold; strong downward watch sustained.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Rare positive (Zion Church pastor Ezra Jin released to US after Trump-Xi intervention) is an individual diplomatically-brokered case, not structural; many Zion leaders remain detained. Does not cross +5pt; systemic repression fully priced. Confirm 19.5.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Balochistan operations continue atop already-priced enforced-disappearance pattern; no discrete new state-attributable step-change; sub-threshold.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Northern man-made famine crisis continues; continuation of the already-priced Jun-19 band crossing; sub-threshold.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Unstable ceasefire; dominant harm is Israel/Hezbollah (external + non-state), not Lebanese-state own conduct; sub-threshold.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: NEW to list. Blockade/protest deaths rose (scan cites 24; open sources 16+); Tupac Katari federation leader Vicente Salazar arrested (El Alto, prosecutors seeking pretrial detention). Directionally NEGATIVE -> no upgrade permitted; harm not atrocity-scale and any move from 6.3 is sub-5pt -> confirmation. Calibration observation (6.3 may sit too LOW for an electoral democracy in austerity crisis, vs mass-atrocity peers) recorded as flag-for-review, NOT resolved.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: HRC Jul 6 resolution ordered urgent El Obeid inquiry; UN FFM El Fasher genocide-markers finding (6,000+ killed in 3 days); RSF encircling 560k+ civilians in El Obeid. Floor (0.0) sustained/reinforced.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Gaza control now ~70% (Gaza MO says 80%); 1,092+ Palestinians killed during ceasefire; continued expansion + forced-displacement orders. Already at floor (0.0); reinforced. Floor sustained.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Largest-ever prisoner exchange (~1,750 detainees) COLLAPSED on start day (Houthi refusal; ICRC cancelled Djibouti flights). Prior 2026-07-10 upward-watch positive did NOT materialize and is RETRACTED (do not carry a reversed positive). Floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Junta airstrike killed 22 displaced people at a Sagaing monastery sheltering 150+ (Jul 11); Gwa naval bombardment (Jul 8); Rakhine bombings (Jul 1). Own-conduct atrocity; floor (0.0) sustained/reinforced.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Own-conduct: political executions at multi-decade high (39+ since Feb 28; 12 more protester death sentences confirmed Jul 5; 6,500+ arrested) intensify repression. A >=5pt move is arithmetically impossible from 2.5 and this is an intensification of an already-priced pattern -> near-floor confirmation, strong downward watch. US strikes on Iran (Jul 8, ~80 targets) = US-attributable harm, logged for digest under US conduct, NOT scored against Iran.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Jul 4 coordinated JNIM/FLA attacks nationwide + Bamako fuel blockade; principally non-state harm. Uniform-1.5 baseline cross-peer calibration flag carried forward (flag-for-review, not resolved). Sub-threshold.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: 22+ soldiers/militia killed in weekend JNIM attacks (Jul 8, northern BF); principally non-state harm; junta civilian abuses already priced. Cross-peer calibration flag carried forward (flag-for-review, not resolved). Sub-threshold.

results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: Systematic gender persecution continues; 8,466 Afghans expelled via Torkham/Spin Boldak in 3 days; NRF/AFF attacks rising. Own-conduct repression fully priced; floor (0.0) sustained. rotation-state rank corrected 189->182.

rotation_state_corrections: afghanistan: rotation-state rank 189 corrected to published index rank 182 (composite/band already matched at 0.0/critical).

tunisia: last_change_proposal updated to 2026-07-11 (open-proposal reaffirmation); composite/band/rank left at PUBLISHED 34.4/developing/109 per assessor-contract (proposed 23.8 lives only in change-proposals/tunisia.json).
calibration_flags_documented: mali-burkina-faso-cross-peer (open, coordinator-level; both Mali uniform-1.5 and Burkina near-floor baselines carried forward as flag-for-review; not resolved unilaterally).

bolivia-critical-band-calibration (NEW, coordinator-level; Bolivia 6.3 may sit too LOW relative to its actual conduct profile as an electoral democracy in austerity crisis vs mass-atrocity peers; recorded as flag-for-review, NOT a one-off reset).
upward_watch_flags_retracted: yemen: prior 2026-07-10 upward-watch (largest-ever prisoner exchange) RETRACTED — the exchange collapsed on its start day (Houthi refusal; ICRC cancelled flights). Positive did not materialize; not carried.
us_conduct_dimension_for_digest: iran: US-Iran ceasefire collapsed Jul 8; US struck ~80 targets across Iran. Externally-inflicted harm attributable to the United States, logged for digest under US conduct — NOT scored against Iran.

notes.tunisia_reaffirmation: The 2026-07-10 open proposal (34.4->23.8, status proposed, day 2) is REAFFIRMED, not duplicated. New within-window evidence (HRC 62nd session close Jul 8; Bensedrine 25yr + ~US$600M fine) is fully consistent with the 23.8 basis and does not materially change the proposed figure. Evidence log appended in change-proposals/tunisia.json (reaffirmation_log). Published score stays 34.4; nothing applied.
notes.bolivia_determination: NEW-to-priority. Assessed against published 6.3. Determination: CONFIRMATION — the within-window evidence is directionally negative (rising death toll, protest-leader arrest), which forbids an upgrade under anti-false-positive screening; the documented harm is not atrocity-scale and any move from a floor-adjacent 6.3 is sub-5pt. Separately raised a calibration flag-for-review (6.3 possibly too low for Bolivia's profile) for coordinator/meta-level; NOT resolved as a one-off reset.
notes.iran_attribution: Own-conduct executions at multi-decade high reinforce the near-floor but cannot produce a >=5pt move from 2.5 and are an intensification of an already-priced pattern -> confirm 2.5. US Jul 8 strikes on Iran are US-attributable and separated out for the digest.
notes.yemen_reversal: Prior upward-watch reversed; floor cannot move lower; documented accurately without carrying the reversed positive.
notes.no_index_modification: No published index JSON modified. validate-indexes.mjs run at close: 0 errors.
